MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-26-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Winston Hom is present.
Attorney, Albert H Lee, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Robert Crespo Jr., is present.
Attorney, Hope Greenhill, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-01-2010 is vacated.
